name: Uzi & Cyn
description:
Art: Madlness.

The lore is Cyn is raping (not rapping) Uzi (yep this is NTR and she might rape you too, I don't know.)

Porn... Porn never changes. (Thanks. Thanks for everything. It might not be a lot, but it's a lot to me. I started this just because I wanted to fix some grammar that doesn't even matter and I'm failing to do so! All I'm saying is, thanks for 50 (53!?(54?!?!)) followers. Hopefully, I'm going to take a break for a long time, or I might leave and never come back. Love y'all, make sure to make reviews and make your chats public.)
